title: sagenia variolosa
intro: Sagenia variolosa, also known as the False London Rocket, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family, Cyatheaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sagenia variolosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and eczema, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Sagenia variolosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
